Student.title: Student
Student.description: Represents a student enrolled in the TechXera Campus, containing personal and academic information necessary for their profile and dashboard.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Student entity (Firebase UID).

studentId.description: The unique identification number or student ID used by the student for login purposes.

firstName.description: The first name of the student.

lastName.description: The last name of the student.

email.description: The email address of the student.

photoURL.description: The URL of the student's profile picture.

enrollmentDate.description: The date and time when the student was officially enrolled.

currentSemester.description: The current academic semester the student is enrolled in.

isApproved.description: Flag indicating if the student account has been approved by an administrator.

status.description: The current status of the student account.

Exam.title: Exam
Exam.description: Represents an examination session or cycle within the campus.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Exam entity.

title.description: The title of the examination (e.g., Final Semester Exam 2025).

semester.description: The academic semester this exam belongs to.

examDate.description: The date when the exam cycle starts.

status.description: The current status of the exam session.

totalMarks.description: The maximum possible marks for subjects in this exam cycle.

Result.title: Result
Result.description: Stores academic results for a specific student, including marks, grades, and associated details for a subject or examination.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Result entity.

studentId.description: Reference to the Student entity this result belongs to.

examId.description: Reference to the Exam entity this result is associated with.

subject.description: The academic subject for which this result is recorded.

semester.description: The academic semester in which this result was obtained.

marks.description: The percentage achieved by the student in the subject.

marksObtained.description: The actual marks scored by the student.

totalMarks.description: The total marks possible for this subject assessment.

grade.description: The letter grade or equivalent awarded for the subject.

examDate.description: The date and time when the examination or assessment was conducted.

performanceNotes.description: Optional administrative notes or comments regarding the student's performance.

StudyMaterial.title: StudyMaterial
StudyMaterial.description: Represents educational resources such as previous questions, notes, or other study aids that students can access and download.

id.description: Unique identifier for the StudyMaterial entity.

title.description: The title or name of the study material.

description.description: A brief description of the study material's content or purpose.

fileUrl.description: The URL or URI pointing to the downloadable file for the study material.

subject.description: The academic subject category to which the study material belongs.

semester.description: The academic semester for which the study material is primarily relevant.

materialType.description: The type of the study material.

uploadDate.description: The date and time when the study material was uploaded to the system.

Notice.title: Notice
Notice.description: Represents an important announcement or notice displayed on the dynamic notice board for students.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Notice entity.

title.description: The concise title of the notice.

description.description: The full content or detailed message of the notice.

publishDate.description: The date and time when the notice was officially published.

isUrgent.description: A flag indicating whether the notice is urgent and requires visual highlighting.

expiryDate.description: The date and time after which the notice is no longer considered active or should be removed.

definition.description: Stores individual student profiles. The document ID (`{studentUid}`) is the Firebase Authentication User ID. Includes approval status.

params.name: studentUid
params.description: The Firebase Authentication User ID (UID) of the student.

definition.description: Stores academic results specific to a student.

params.name: studentUid
params.description: The Firebase Authentication User ID (UID) of the student owner.

params.name: resultId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific academic result document.

params.name: examId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific exam document.

params.name: materialId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific study material document.

params.name: noticeId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific notice document.

definition.description: A marker collection for admin privileges.

params.name: adminUid
params.description: The Firebase Authentication User ID (UID) of an administrator.
